rationale.ai-code-insecurity: Synthesizes 40-50% CWE vulnerability rates, 86% XSS-defense failures
rationale.quality-debt: 28.7% fully-correct, 51.2% need intervention, correctness degrades with complexity
rationale.automation-bias: Perception-reality gap: perceived 20% faster while 19% slower
rationale.org-governance: Recommends governance frameworks, IP/liability policies before adoption
rationale.lit-review: Secondary synthesis of IEEE, ACM, industry studies 2020-2025
rationale.survey-input: 62-84% adoption and preference metrics for survey design
